title: Syracuse Finest no match for the Bravest in police vs. fire basketball game
summary: Syracuse Fire Department defeated Syracuse Police Department 92-88 in their charity basketball game at Corcoran High School on May 24, 2025, raising $2,500 for United Way of Central New York. The event marked the return of a decades-long inter-departmental rivalry after a five-year hiatus due to COVID-19, with approximately 250 attendees including Mayor Ben Walsh and SU Football Coach Fran Brown.

entity_refs.name: United Way of Central New York

political_signal.description: Mayor's public attendance and trophy presentation signal organizational support for inter-departmental collaboration and community engagement through charitable event.

processing_notes: Article date (2025-05-24) is future-dated; recommend verification. Recommended section contains unrelated basketball articles suggesting content syndication. Fire Chief claims historical winning streak; Police Chief disputes—factual record unclear.
